name: Opticor
description: Once charged this Corpus laser cannon dispatches a devastating blast of light energy.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Once charged this Corpus laser cannon dispatches a devastating blast of light energy.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Opticor Elixis Skin

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: The Opticor will now queue charging if you click+hold during its re-fire wait time (instead of ignoring your click if you didn't wait the full 1 second).

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to install Catalysts on certain weapons (Cernos, Opticor, etc).
Fixed Opticor Quick Attacks being compared to Charged Attacks and showing green numbers as if there is improvement in the stat summary in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas, Frost, Valkyr, Nidus, and Oberon's left arm bending in an unsettling way when holding the Opticor with their Noble Animation Sets equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka, Opticor, Helios, Convectrix & Arca Plasmor Research missing from the Energy Lab.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor and Opticor having an overly bright FX.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Opticor and Opticor Vandal weapon charge up animations not playing.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Opticor Vandal
Updated the firing FX of the Opticor.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Opticor (and likely others) not drawing a new beam with high Fire Rate Mods.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.changes: Dagger Crubbak Skin by Lubox and ScharkieRapier Ferita Skin by HitsuSan and ReilTonfa Hades Skin by malayu, Scharkie, and JadieGreatsword Ion Skin by Yatus and IgnusDeiGreatsword Karv’r Skin by Faven and ScharkieRapier Ni'Duhl Skin by FavenOpticor Mithra Skin by lukinu_uSword Tengushen Skin by BeastBuster

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed larger Beam weapons (Opticor, etc) unable to hit weak points, such as Vay Hek as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1018929-opticor-does-no-damage-to-vay-hek-anymore/

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Opticor occasionally damaging a single enemy multiple times.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed weapons like the Opticor having its hits blocked by your companion. Also fixed the hits sometimes not taking effect if other geometry was nearby.
Fixed rare cases of Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors creating a permanently firing Opticor.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Opticor and beam weapons sometimes not being able to hit Corpus Nullifier bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.14.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a potential script error when using the Opticor.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where weapons that have a girth to their effective range like the Opticor were not hitting enemies in the correct order (sometimes missing nearby enemies but hitting ones further along its path).

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Opticor now benefits from Critical Chance / Critical Chance Multiplier Mods (the existing beam always did but the radial AoE damage did not).

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
Opticor beam now has a radius (thicker more cylinder shaped beam) that will allow you to hit more enemies with a single beam.
Increased the Opticor AoE damage radius from 3 meters to 5 meters.
Fixed being unable to destroy Nullifier bubbles with the Opticor. 
Fixed being unable to kill enemies inside a Nullifier bubble or Eximus Snow Globe with the Opticor. This also fixes being unable to hit Lephantis or Sargas Ruk at times.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.5
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced Opticor charge time of from 2.5 to 2 seconds.
Temporarily removed Opticor beam thickness until it can be tested more thoroughly.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to hit Nullifier bubbles and other targets with melee weapons and the Opticor.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Opticor not having it’s 1m Punch Through.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Opticor not being able to damage enemies outside of a Frost’s Snow Globe when fired from inside the Snow Globe.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.2
patchlogs.changes: The Shock-Camo Opticor Skin is available for purchase in your Arsenal and we swear it's not a Braton model!

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where the Opticor would explode on Volt's Electric Shield instead of simply passing through and amplifying the damage.
Fixed the Opticor and Ferrox not dealing any damage if it was fired inside Limbo's Stasis as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/791540-opticor-limbos-stasis-bugged/

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a visual bug for Clients where the charged shots of the Opticor, Angstrum, Javlok, or Ferrox would appear to fire twice.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Impair on hit status removed from Opticor in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Nightmares
patchlogs.changes: Increased the Aim Zoom of the Opticor in Variant.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Opticor in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a rare case where a player could fire a weapon (Opticor) and get disarmed as they are firing which results in the owner of the weapon to be nulled out.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.changes: •    The Deft Tempo Mod can no longer be used with the Opticor or Miter.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Angstrum, Opticor and Stug displaying incorrect noise levels in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Opticor damage has been adjusted to one hit kill against the highest base EHP without +EHP mods in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Opticor beams not showing the proper energy color.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed fire rate Mods not allowing charge weapons like the Ogris or Opticor to fire.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.10.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed charged beams from the Opticor not aiming properly when fired by Mirage’s clones.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Spectres being unable to use the Opticor correctly.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.1.0+15.1.01
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issues with Crewman in Bastille not being affected by headshots with the Opticor (https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/335385-opticor-bastille-vs-corpus-cant-headshot/)
Fixed an issue with the Opticor not having a listed Trigger type.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.8
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the intensity of the Opticor explosion visual effects.
Tweaked the partially charged Opticor shot sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed the charge damage multiplier not working correctly for the Opticor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Opticor's Color customization corrupting memory and causing crashes (and other similar cases).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Opticor’s sound being heard by entire squad as if they were using it.
